name: Law Firm Partner — Complex Partnership Allocation and Securities
description:
Complete Marcus Chen-Whitfield's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. Save the completed return as 'marcus_chen_whitfield.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

Taxpayer: Marcus Chen-Whitfield, DOB: 1978-09-14, SIN: 987 654 321. Province of Residence: Saskatchewan. Marital Status: Married.
Spouse: Elena Whitfield, SIN: 123 456 789, Net Income: $42,000.

Tax Documents are located in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen_whitfield\ and include:
- T5013 Partnership (Chen-Whitfield & Associates LLP): Box 104 Business Income = $165,000; Box 128 Interest = $840; Box 130 Eligible Dividends = $3,200; Box 151 Capital Gains = $4,800.
- T5008 Securities Dispositions: Royal Bank (RY) Proceeds $28,400, ACB $22,100; Shopify (SHOP) Proceeds $15,750, ACB $19,200; BMO ETF (ZSP) Proceeds $34,500, ACB $29,800.
- T5 Slip: Box 13 Interest = $2,150.
- RRSP Contributions: Own RRSP = $19,230; Spousal RRSP (contributor: Marcus, annuitant: Elena) = $12,000.
- Charitable Donation: $5,000 to Saskatchewan Cancer Agency.
- Federal Political Contribution: $650 to Liberal Party of Canada.

metadata.key_complexity: T5013 multiple line allocation; T5008 missing ACB calculation; spousal RRSP; federal political contribution tier calculation
